title: Spicy Tofu Croquettes
description: A gluten-free snack recipe that combines spicy and savory flavors.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together the crushed spicy croquettes, gluten-free breadcrumbs, salt, black pepper, and chili flakes.
Add the beaten egg to the bowl and mix until a sticky dough forms.
Add the crumbled tofu to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties or balls.
Dip each patty or ball into the crushed crunchy coating, pressing gently to adhere.
Place the coated croquettes in a single layer in the air fryer basket.
Cook for 12-15 minutes, shaking the basket halfway through.
